commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Six days you shall eat unleavened bread: and on the seventh day shall be a solemn assembly to the LORD your God: you shall do no work therein. Six days after the solemn day is ended, or in all seven (Exodus xiii. ; Calmet); or the seventh day is here remarkable, for some particular distinction. (Menochius) Assembly. Hebrew, "the feast of prohibition, or of withholding "or rather the festival day, in which all must make their appearance, to do homage to their Lord, Leviticus xxiii. (Calmet) Septuagint, "on the 7th is the dismiss ion, (or termination) a feast to the Lord.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
